heading: Governor, Director, and alternates
label: 283bb Governor, Director, and alternates
text: The Governor and Executive Director of the Inter-American Development Bank, and the alternate for each of them, appointed under , shall serve as Governor, Director, and alternates, respectively, of the Corporation.section 283a of this title
notes: CodificationSection is based on section 203 of title II of S. 2416, Ninety-eighth Congress, as introduced , and enacted into law by .Mar. 13, 1984Pub. L. 98–473
